name: @feinarbyte/file-merge
description: File fragment merger - merge JSON, YAML, text files and more from templates, fragments, and overrides. Batteries included, dlx-ready.

scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch -m 'chore(release): %s' && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor -m 'chore(release): %s' && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major -m 'chore(release): %s' && git push && git push --tags
